title: Brooklyn Borough President — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Office of the Brooklyn Borough President (BPBK) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the BPBK NYC Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us, agency label 'Brooklyn Borough President (BPBK)'), the current WordPress/Events-Calendar content site (www.brooklynbp.nyc.gov), and the office's constituent-facing forms. Includes the NYC geography spine, Brooklyn community-board references, and the appointee/term shape common to the many 'BP Appointments' datasets.

Borough.description: NYC borough. Brooklyn BP business is Brooklyn-centric, but appointees and grantees may carry other-borough addresses.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across BPBK datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government.

communityBoard.description: Brooklyn community board / district number ('Community Board' / 'COMMUNITY DISTRICT'). Brooklyn has boards 1-18.

councilDistrict.description: NYC Council district ('Council District' / 'Council District(s)'). May be a comma/space list for multi-district ULURP items.

nta.description: Neighborhood Tabulation Area name or code ('NTA').

PersonName.description: A person named in a BPBK dataset — appointees, chairs, district managers, honorees.

full.description: Full name where a dataset provides a single name field.

Term.description: Appointment term fields carried by the 'BP Appointments' datasets.

AppointeeOrRepresentative.description: Whether the person is a direct BP appointee or a representative ('APPOINTEE OR REPRESENTATIVE' / 'REPRESENTATIVE OR APPOINTEE').
